# ThirdParty dependencies

`0Harmony.dll` is a required runtime dependency for the current project stage.

Place it here:

```text
external/ThirdParty/0Harmony.dll
```

The currently stored DLL appears to be Harmony `2.4.2.0`.

Known SHA256:

```text
7b9e756306fa3d7620e02a857c8927a6ab04973f9bd8a77d3866700a6deac55c
```

If a local DLL differs from this hash, update this document with the new version and hash. Do not silently replace it.

Do not put Terraria game binaries here.
